failedAssertions.reason: Prompt tokens missing from logprobs when KV cache is warm. When echo:true + logprobs:true, the logprobs array should include all prompt tokens but only contains template suffix tokens + generated tokens for cached prompts. Verified that fresh (uncached) prompts correctly include all prompt tokens in logprobs. Root cause: prefill is skipped on KV cache hits, so the batched logSoftmax computation for prompt logprobs is not performed.

Same root cause as VAL-ECHO-002: prompt+completion concatenation broken for cached prompts. The logprobs array has far fewer entries than expected (prompt_tokens + completion_tokens) when the prompt is in KV cache. Works correctly for fresh prompts where the full prompt logprob capture happens during prefill.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance section for Echo + Prompt Logprobs surface with model info, isolation rules, and Gemma-specific token handling notes

notes: The echo feature works correctly for fresh prompts. The KV cache hit path skips prompt logprob computation, causing failures for repeated identical prompts. This is a real implementation bug that needs fixing in TokenIterator.prepare() - the prompt logprob capture should be triggered regardless of KV cache state when echo or prompt_logprobs is requested.
